headline: Marvell Gets Another Shout-Out: It (And Flex) Are Joining the S&P 500
summary: The company that maintains the S&P 500 index on Friday tapped Marvell Technology and Flex as the next two companies to join the benchmark index.

headline: Should Campbell's (CPB) Buffalo Wild Wings Soup Tie-Up Reframe Its Brand and Margin Story?
summary: On 3 June 2026, Campbell Soup Company and Buffalo Wild Wings, Inc. launched Campbell's Chunky Buffalo Wild Wings Parmesan Garlic Chicken Noodle Soup, blending a creamy twist on classic chicken noodle with Buffalo Wild Wings’ signature Parmesan Garlic flavor. This collaboration highlights Campbell’s push to attract younger soup consumers with bolder flavors just as analysts highlight pressure on earnings, margins, and volumes. We’ll now examine how these weaker earnings expectations,...
